zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs於大約1198年出生時，他的父親Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen39歲，母親Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace37歲。他於1237年與Adelheid Berthout結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1254年1月21日在比利時布拉班特洛文享年57歲，埋葬在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特阿福利格姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs于大约1198年出生时，他的父亲Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen39岁，母亲Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace37岁。他于1237年与Adelheid Berthout结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1254年1月21日在比利时布拉班特洛文享年57岁，埋葬在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特阿福利格姆。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs was born about 1198, his father, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, was 39 and his mother, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, was 37. He married Adelheid Berthout in 1237. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 21 January 1254, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 57, and was buried in Affligem, Flemish Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs est né environ 1198, son père, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid Berthout en 1237. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1254, à Louvain, Brabant, Belgique, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Affligem, Brabant Flamand, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs um 1198 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen 39 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace 37. Er hat 1237 Adelheid Berthout geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Januar 1254 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien und wurde in Affligem, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs è nato il circa 1198, il suo padre, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid Berthout nel 1237. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1254, nel Leuven, Brabante, Belgio, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Affligem, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijsが約1198年に生まれた時，父Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenは39歳，母Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsaceは37歳であった。1237年にAdelheid Berthoutと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1254年1月21日にベルギーブラバントレウベンで57歳で死去し，ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントアフリジェムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs(이)가 대략 1198년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1237년 Adelheid Berthout(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 1월 21일 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 아플리그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs nasceu aproximadamente 1198, seu pai, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid Berthout em 1237. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1254, em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Affligem, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs родился около 1198 г., его отцу по имени Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid Berthout в 1237 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 21 января 1254 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности аффлигем, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfried van Brabant-Gaasbeek-Perwijs nació aproximadamente 1198, su papá, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Adelheid Berthout en 1237. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1254, en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Affligem, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.
